description: Utilitarian roles that serve specific narrative or gameplay functions.
roles: Quest Giver
The hook launching the protagonists into action, framing the objective and setting the terms of success before they can hesitate.
Gatekeeper
An immovable barrier between the protagonists and what they need, demanding proof of worth before granting passage.
Witness
The only eyes that saw what happened, holding testimony that can confirm the truth or unravel a carefully constructed lie.
Victim
A human face on the threat, giving the protagonists a moral imperative that makes walking away impossible.
Messenger
News arriving like a shockwave, compressing distance and time so distant events land with immediate, unavoidable impact.
Trader
Needs turned into negotiations, creating moments where the protagonists must decide what they are willing to sacrifice.
Riddle-Master
Wit tested instead of strength -- progress blocked behind a puzzle that forces the protagonists to think before they can act.
Oracle
Glimpses of what is coming, seeding dread or hope that colors every decision the protagonists make from that moment on.
Collector
Covetous interest in something the protagonists possess, creating leverage spendable on alliance, information, or safe passage.
Chronicler
A living record of the protagonists' deeds, making reputation a consequence that follows them everywhere the story goes.
